requirement_topic.en: Low Voltage Safety — EV Charging Equipment (General) — Hungary
requirement_topic.zh: 低压安全——电动汽车充电设备（通用）——匈牙利
requirement_topic.zht: 低壓安全——電動汽車充電設備（通用）——匈牙利

summary.en: EV charging equipment placed on the Hungarian/EU market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU, ensuring it is designed and manufactured to be safe when correctly installed and maintained. Equipment must meet the Essential Safety Requirements (Annex I) covering protection against electric shock, insulation, overcurrent/overtemperature protection, and clearances. Harmonised standard EN IEC 61851-1:2019 (Mode 1–4 conductive charging, AC and DC, general requirements) provides a presumption of conformity. In Hungary, MSZT adopts harmonised standards as MSZ EN standards; market surveillance is conducted by MKEH and sector-specific authorities.
summary.zh: 在匈牙利/欧盟市场销售的电动汽车充电设备须符合低压指令2014/35/EU，确保其在正确安装及维护条件下安全运行。设备须满足附件I基本安全要求，涵盖防触电、绝缘、过流/过温保护及电气间隙。协调标准EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4传导充电，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。在匈牙利，MSZT以MSZ EN标准形式采用协调标准；市场监管由MKEH及行业主管机构负责。
summary.zht: 在匈牙利/歐盟市場銷售的電動汽車充電設備須符合低壓指令2014/35/EU，確保其在正確安裝及維護條件下安全運行。設備須滿足附件I基本安全要求，涵蓋防觸電、絕緣、過流/過溫保護及電氣間隙。協調標準EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4傳導充電，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。在匈牙利，MSZT以MSZ EN標準形式採用協調標準；市場監管由MKEH及行業主管機構負責。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61851-1:2019 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

summary.en: China commonly references GB/T 18487.1-2015 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements), which is technically aligned with IEC 61851-1 but incorporates national deviations. It is enforced under the GB framework administered by SAMR/SAC. GB/T 18487.1 testing and certification by a Chinese CNAS-accredited lab is NOT recognised as equivalent to EN IEC 61851-1 testing under the EU LVD conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国常见参考标准为GB/T 18487.1-2015（电动汽车传导充电系统——通用要求），技术上与IEC 61851-1相关但含有国家偏差，由市场监管总局/国家标准化管理委员会监督执行。国内CNAS认可实验室依据GB/T 18487.1出具的检测及认证，不被欧盟LVD合格评定程序直接认可为等同。
summary.zht: 中國常見參考標準為GB/T 18487.1-2015（電動汽車傳導充電系統——通用要求），技術上與IEC 61851-1相關但含有國家偏差，由市場監管總局/國家標準化管理委員會監督執行。國內CNAS認可實驗室依據GB/T 18487.1出具的檢測及認證，不被歐盟LVD合格評定程序直接認可為等同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements (SAMR/SAC)

gap.en: Exporters should build an EU conformity file against the LVD essential safety requirements and may use EN IEC 61851-1:2019 testing as evidence for presumption of conformity. Existing Chinese GB/T 18487.1 test reports do not automatically substitute because scope, deviations, connector assumptions and documentation differ. A Notified Body is not mandatory for LVD; manufacturer self-declaration with a Technical File is the normal route. Documentation gap: EU Declaration of Conformity, CE marking, and user instructions available in Hungarian are all required for Hungarian market access.
gap.zh: 出口商应围绕低压指令基本安全要求建立欧盟合规技术文件，并可采用EN IEC 61851-1:2019检测作为推定符合性的证据。现有GB/T 18487.1检测报告不会自动替代，因为范围、偏差、接口假设及文件要求不同。LVD通常不强制要求公告机构；制造商自我声明加技术文件是常规路径。文件差距：进入匈牙利市场须提供欧盟符合性声明、CE标志，以及匈牙利语版本的用户说明书。
gap.zht: 出口商應圍繞低壓指令基本安全要求建立歐盟合規技術文件，並可採用EN IEC 61851-1:2019檢測作為推定符合性的證據。現有GB/T 18487.1檢測報告不會自動替代，因為範圍、偏差、接口假設及文件要求不同。LVD通常不強制要求公告機構；製造商自我聲明加技術文件是常規路徑。文件差距：進入匈牙利市場須提供歐盟符合性聲明、CE標誌，以及匈牙利語版本的用戶說明書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: Directive 2014/35/EU and CE marking before Hungarian/EU market placement. EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is voluntary harmonised-standard evidence for presumption of conformity; alternative technical solutions are allowed if the manufacturer demonstrates compliance with the LVD essential safety requirements. User instructions in Hungarian are required for consumer-facing products.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 18487.1 compliance required under SAMR framework

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is mandatory. EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is a voluntary harmonised standard that can grant presumption of conformity for general EV conductive charging; it is not the legal obligation itself. Chinese GB/T 18487.1 certification does not by itself satisfy the EU conformity assessment pathway; EU evidence against the LVD requirements is needed. Hungarian-language user instructions are required for the Hungarian market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据LVD 2014/35/EU，CE标志为强制要求。EN IEC 61851-1:2019是可用于电动汽车传导充电通用要求推定符合性的自愿协调标准，并非法律义务本身。中国GB/T 18487.1认证本身不满足欧盟合格评定路径；仍需提供针对LVD要求的欧盟证据。匈牙利市场需要匈牙利语用户说明书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據LVD 2014/35/EU，CE標誌為強制要求。EN IEC 61851-1:2019是可用於電動汽車傳導充電通用要求推定符合性的自願協調標準，並非法律義務本身。中國GB/T 18487.1認證本身不滿足歐盟合格評定路徑；仍需提供針對LVD要求的歐盟證據。匈牙利市場需要匈牙利語用戶說明書。

requirement_topic.en: DC Charging Station Safety — EV Conductive Charging — Hungary
requirement_topic.zh: 直流充电站安全——电动汽车传导充电——匈牙利
requirement_topic.zht: 直流充電站安全——電動汽車傳導充電——匈牙利

summary.en: DC charging stations (Mode 4, off-board chargers) placed on the Hungarian/EU market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU where within scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station) is a current product standard that may be used as technical evidence and, where cited as harmonised, gives presumption of conformity; it is not itself the mandatory legal obligation. Key technical topics include isolation monitoring, interlock systems, control pilot functions, maximum voltage/current ratings, and communication protocols for DC supply. Hungary's automotive OEM environment creates demand for high-power DC stations (up to 350 kW) compatible with latest vehicle platforms.
summary.zh: 投放匈牙利/欧盟市场的直流充电站（模式4，非车载充电机）在适用范围内须符合低压指令2014/35/EU。EN IEC 61851-23:2023（电动汽车传导充电系统——第23部分：直流电动汽车充电站）是现行产品标准，可作为技术证据使用；在被列为协调标准时，可产生推定符合性，但其本身并非强制性法律义务。核心技术主题包括绝缘监控、互锁系统、控制引导功能、最大电压/电流额定值及直流供电通信协议。匈牙利汽车OEM环境对高功率直流充电站（最高350 kW）的需求较高，须与最新车辆平台兼容。
summary.zht: 投放匈牙利/歐盟市場的直流充電站（模式4，非車載充電機）在適用範圍內須符合低壓指令2014/35/EU。EN IEC 61851-23:2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統——第23部分：直流電動汽車充電站）是現行產品標準，可作為技術證據使用；在被列為協調標準時，可產生推定符合性，但其本身並非強制性法律義務。核心技術主題包括絕緣監控、互鎖系統、控制導引功能、最大電壓/電流額定值及直流供電通訊協議。匈牙利汽車OEM環境對高功率直流充電站（最高350 kW）的需求較高，須與最新車輛平台相容。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station (current edition, supersedes 2014)

summary.en: China's DC charging station domestic equivalent is GB/T 18487.3-2001 (AC/DC electric vehicle charging station — the only published Part 3 of the 18487 series). The current DC system standard is GB/T 18487.5-2024 (DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3 connector). The DC coupler standard is GB/T 20234.3-2023 (supports up to 1500 V / 800 A). CQC or CNAS certification to these Chinese standards is not accepted under the EU LVD CE marking pathway.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电站国内对应标准为GB/T 18487.3-2001（交直流电动汽车充电站——GB/T 18487系列第3部分的唯一发布版本）。现行直流系统标准为GB/T 18487.5-2024（适用于GB/T 20234.3接口的直流充电系统）。直流耦合器标准为GB/T 20234.3-2023（支持最高1500V/800A）。依据上述中国标准获得的CQC或CNAS认证，在欧盟LVD CE标志合格评定路径下不被接受。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電站國內對應標準為GB/T 18487.3-2001（交直流電動汽車充電站——GB/T 18487系列第3部分的唯一發布版本）。現行直流系統標準為GB/T 18487.5-2024（適用於GB/T 20234.3接口的直流充電系統）。直流耦合器標準為GB/T 20234.3-2023（支持最高1500V/800A）。依據上述中國標準獲得的CQC或CNAS認證，在歐盟LVD CE標誌合格評定路徑下不被接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.3-2001 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — AC/DC electric vehicle charging station (only published edition; no 2015 revision exists)
GB/T 18487.5-2024 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 5: DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3 (current DC system standard)
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler (supersedes 2015 edition)

gap.en: DC charging stations exported to Hungary should be assessed against the LVD essential safety requirements and may use EN IEC 61851-23:2023 testing as presumption-of-conformity evidence where applicable. Particular attention is needed for: (1) CCS2 (Combined Charging System Type 2) connector compliance vs. Chinese GB/T connector; (2) ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 communication protocol compatibility (required by automotive OEMs in Hungary for smart charging); (3) high-power station design (up to 350 kW) thermal management for Hungary's continental climate (-20°C to +40°C range); and (4) Hungarian-language safety labels, installation manuals, and operator documentation.
gap.zh: 出口匈牙利的直流充电站应针对LVD基本安全要求进行评估，并可在适用时采用EN IEC 61851-23:2023检测作为推定符合性证据。重点关注：（1）CCS2（组合充电系统2型）连接器合规性与中国GB/T连接器的差异；（2）ISO 15118 / DIN 70121通信协议兼容性（匈牙利汽车OEM对智能充电的要求）；（3）大功率充电站设计（最高350 kW）针对匈牙利大陆性气候（-20°C至+40°C范围）的热管理；（4）匈牙利语安全标签、安装手册和运营商文件。
gap.zht: 出口匈牙利的直流充電站應針對LVD基本安全要求進行評估，並可在適用時採用EN IEC 61851-23:2023檢測作為推定符合性證據。重點關注：（1）CCS2（組合充電系統2型）連接器合規性與中國GB/T連接器的差異；（2）ISO 15118 / DIN 70121通訊協議相容性（匈牙利汽車OEM對智能充電的要求）；（3）大功率充電站設計（最高350 kW）針對匈牙利大陸性氣候（-20°C至+40°C範圍）的熱管理；（4）匈牙利語安全標籤、安裝手冊和運營商文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: CE marking under Directive 2014/35/EU where the charger is within LVD scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 is a voluntary technical standard that may support presumption of conformity where harmonised/cited. Hungarian-language user instructions required for consumer/operator use.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 18487.5-2024 is the current DC charging system standard; CCC mandatory from 1 March 2025 under CNCA-C25-01:2024

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DC charging stations require CE marking under the applicable EU legislation, including LVD where in scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 is a voluntary product standard used as technical evidence or presumption-of-conformity support where harmonised; it is not mandatory in itself. Chinese GB/T 18487.3 certification is not accepted as an EU conformity assessment substitute. A significant hardware gap exists where Chinese DC stations use GB/T connectors incompatible with EU CCS2 practice. Hungarian automotive OEM clients additionally require ISO 15118 smart-charging communication capability.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 直流充电站须依据适用欧盟法律取得CE标志，其中在LVD范围内的产品须符合低压指令。EN IEC 61851-23:2023是可作为技术证据或在协调时用于推定符合性的自愿产品标准，并非自身强制。中国GB/T 18487.3认证不能替代欧盟合格评定。若中国直流充电站使用与欧盟CCS2实践不兼容的GB/T连接器，则存在重大硬件差距。匈牙利汽车OEM客户还额外要求ISO 15118智能充电通信能力。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 直流充電站須依據適用歐盟法律取得CE標誌，其中在LVD範圍內的產品須符合低壓指令。EN IEC 61851-23:2023是可作為技術證據或在協調時用於推定符合性的自願產品標準，並非自身強制。中國GB/T 18487.3認證不能替代歐盟合格評定。若中國直流充電站使用與歐盟CCS2實務不相容的GB/T連接器，則存在重大硬體差距。匈牙利汽車OEM客戶還額外要求ISO 15118智能充電通訊能力。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical Installation Safety — EV Charging in Buildings (IEC 60364-7-722) — Hungary
requirement_topic.zh: 建筑内电动汽车充电电气安装安全（IEC 60364-7-722）——匈牙利
requirement_topic.zht: 建築內電動汽車充電電氣安裝安全（IEC 60364-7-722）——匈牙利

summary.en: Hungarian member-state electrical installation law and DSO/installer rules govern the building-side circuits supplying EV charging points. IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 provide the commonly adopted technical installation route covering protective measures (RCD type B or A+DC detection), wiring, earthing, and load management. These standards apply to the building-side installation infrastructure, not the charger product itself, but exported EV chargers should be compatible with these installation requirements so they can be accepted by Hungarian installers, DSOs, and building inspectors. Hungary uses a TN-C-S earthing system as standard, consistent with general EU practice.
summary.zh: 匈牙利成员国电气安装法律及配电系统运营商/安装方规则规范电动汽车充电点的建筑侧供电回路。IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722提供常用的技术安装路径，涵盖保护措施（B型RCD或A型+直流检测）、布线、接地及负荷管理。这些标准适用于建筑侧安装基础设施，而非充电设备产品本身，但出口匈牙利的充电设备应与相关安装要求兼容，以便获得匈牙利安装商、配电系统运营商和建筑检验员接受。匈牙利标准采用TN-C-S接地系统，与欧盟通行做法一致。
summary.zht: 匈牙利成員國電氣安裝法律及配電系統運營商/安裝方規則規範電動汽車充電點的建築側供電迴路。IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722提供常用的技術安裝路徑，涵蓋保護措施（B型RCD或A型+直流檢測）、布線、接地及負荷管理。這些標準適用於建築側安裝基礎設施，而非充電設備產品本身，但出口匈牙利的充電設備應與相關安裝要求相容，以便獲得匈牙利安裝商、配電系統運營商和建築檢驗員接受。匈牙利標準採用TN-C-S接地系統，與歐盟通行做法一致。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60364-7-722:2018 — Low-voltage electrical installations — Part 7-722: Requirements for special installations or locations — Supply of electric vehicles
HD 60364-7-722 (CENELEC harmonised document, adopted by Hungary via MSZT as MSZ HD 60364-7-722)
Hungarian electrical installation regulations and building codes administered by relevant national authorities

summary.en: China addresses EV charging installation primarily through GB 50966-2014 (Code for design of electric vehicle charging station) and GB/T 51313-2018 (Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure), administered by the Ministry of Housing and Urban-Rural Development (MOHURD). These cover site design and installation but differ from IEC 60364-7-722 in RCD type requirements, earthing system assumptions (TN-S vs. Chinese practice), and load management protocols. Chinese installation documentation is not accepted as evidence of compliance with Hungarian/EU member-state installation standards.
summary.zh: 【未经核实】中国主要通过GB 50966-2014（电动汽车充电站设计规范）及GB/T 51313-2018（电动汽车充电基础设施技术标准）处理充电安装事宜，由住房和城乡建设部负责管理。上述标准涵盖场地设计及安装，但在RCD类型要求、接地系统假设（TN-S与中国实践的差异）及负荷管理协议方面与IEC 60364-7-722存在差异。中国安装文件不被接受作为符合匈牙利/欧盟成员国安装标准的证据。
summary.zht: 【未經核實】中國主要通過GB 50966-2014（電動汽車充電站設計規範）及GB/T 51313-2018（電動汽車充電基礎設施技術標準）處理充電安裝事宜，由住房和城鄉建設部負責管理。上述標準涵蓋場地設計及安裝，但在RCD類型要求、接地系統假設（TN-S與中國實踐的差異）及負荷管理協議方面與IEC 60364-7-722存在差異。中國安裝文件不被接受作為符合匈牙利/歐盟成員國安裝標準的證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 50966-2014 — Code for design of electric vehicle charging station (MOHURD) (confirmed to exist; enforced by MOHURD/MIIT)
GB/T 51313-2018 — Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure (confirmed to exist; enforced by MOHURD/MIIT)

gap.en: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 / MSZ HD 60364-7-722 are installation standards — they govern fixed wiring and protection devices at the building side, not the charger product itself. However, exported EV chargers should declare compatibility with Type B RCDs or incorporate internal DC fault protection to allow Type A RCDs under Hungarian/EU installation practice. A charger that requires installation conditions not achievable under Hungarian electrical codes will fail building inspection. Chinese charger datasheets often omit compatibility statements expected by Hungarian installers and DSOs. Hungarian-language installation instructions and wiring diagrams are expected by local installers.
gap.zh: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 / MSZ HD 60364-7-722为安装标准，规范建筑侧固定布线及保护装置，而非充电设备产品本身。但出口匈牙利的充电设备应依据匈牙利/欧盟安装实践声明与B型RCD兼容，或内置直流故障保护以允许使用A型RCD。若充电设备要求的安装条件在匈牙利电气规范下无法实现，将无法通过建筑检验。中国充电设备产品规格书通常未包含匈牙利安装商及配电系统运营商所期望的兼容性声明。当地安装商期望提供匈牙利语安装说明书和接线图。
gap.zht: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 / MSZ HD 60364-7-722為安裝標準，規範建築側固定布線及保護裝置，而非充電設備產品本身。但出口匈牙利的充電設備應依據匈牙利/歐盟安裝實務聲明與B型RCD相容，或內置直流故障保護以允許使用A型RCD。若充電設備要求的安裝條件在匈牙利電氣規範下無法實現，將無法通過建築檢驗。中國充電設備產品規格書通常未包含匈牙利安裝商及配電系統運營商所期望的相容性聲明。當地安裝商期望提供匈牙利語安裝說明書和接線圖。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation sits in Hungarian electrical installation law and building regulations. IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 / MSZ HD 60364-7-722 are technical standards commonly used to demonstrate accepted installation practice; product compatibility is a practical market requirement. Hungarian-language installation documentation is expected.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic installation — GB 50966 / GB/T 51313 under MOHURD (confirmed as published standards enforced by MOHURD/MIIT; check SAC for any 2023-2025 revisions)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 / MSZ HD 60364-7-722 govern building-side installation practice as adopted through Hungarian national rules. EV chargers exported to Hungary should be compatible with the RCD and earthing requirements expected by installers and DSOs. This is distinct from product-level CE marking under LVD, but non-compatibility can block building inspection sign-off. Chinese installation standards (GB 50966 / GB/T 51313) are not substitutes. Hungarian-language installation instructions are expected by local installers and building inspectors.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 / MSZ HD 60364-7-722通过匈牙利国家规则采纳后规范建筑侧安装实践。出口匈牙利的充电设备应与安装商及配电系统运营商所期望的RCD和接地要求兼容。这与产品层面依据LVD取得CE标志不同，但不兼容会阻碍建筑检验通过。中国安装标准（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。当地安装商和建筑检验员期望提供匈牙利语安装说明书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 / MSZ HD 60364-7-722通過匈牙利國家規則採納後規範建築側安裝實務。出口匈牙利的充電設備應與安裝商及配電系統運營商所期望的RCD和接地要求相容。這與產品層面依據LVD取得CE標誌不同，但不相容會阻礙建築檢驗通過。中國安裝標準（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。當地安裝商和建築檢驗員期望提供匈牙利語安裝說明書。
